channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Australia grants asylum to 5 members of the Iranian women's soccer team
item.description: Australia has granted asylum to five members of the Iranian women's soccer team who were in the country for a tournament when the Iran war began.
item.content:encoded:
Australia has granted asylum to five members of the Iranian women's soccer team who were in the country for a tournament when the Iran war began.

(Image credit: Dave Hunt)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: As U.S. and Israel strike Iran, China's foreign policy experts question Washington
item.description: The U.S. and Israeli joint attacks on Iran have prompted alarm and intense discussion among China's foreign policy elite as they prepare for a U.S. presidential visit.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. and Israeli joint attacks on Iran have prompted alarm and intense discussion among China's foreign policy elite as they prepare for a U.S. presidential visit.
item.dc:creator: Emily Feng

item.title: What to know about Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader
item.description: The second son of the late supreme leader keeps a low profile. But he's long been viewed as wielding his power behind the scenes, from crushing dissent to influencing presidential elections.
item.content:encoded:
The second son of the late supreme leader keeps a low profile. But he's long been viewed as wielding his power behind the scenes, from crushing dissent to influencing presidential elections.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Iran picks new leader. And, Trump won't sign bills until Congress overhauls voting
item.description: Iran has named Mojtaba Khamenei as its new supreme leader. And, President Trump says he will not sign any more bills until Congress overhauls voting.
item.content:encoded:
Iran has named Mojtaba Khamenei as its new supreme leader. And, President Trump says he will not sign any more bills until Congress overhauls voting.

(Image credit: Rouzbeh Fouladi)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: The U.S. names its 7th dead soldier, Iran names a new supreme leader on Day 10 of war
item.description: The Pentagon said a Space Brigade sergeant was killed and the price of oil increased after Iran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and then launched new attacks at Israel and Gulf states.
item.content:encoded:
The Pentagon said a Space Brigade sergeant was killed and the price of oil increased after Iran named Mojtaba Khamenei as supreme leader and then launched new attacks at Israel and Gulf states.

(Image credit: Bilal Hussein)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: World shares tumble as Iran war pushes crude prices over $110 a barrel
item.description: World shares tumbled on Monday, with Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 index plunging more than 5%, after oil prices spiked at nearly $120 a barrel.
item.content:encoded:
World shares tumbled on Monday, with Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 index plunging more than 5%, after oil prices spiked at nearly $120 a barrel.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Millions more people are in the path of rising seas than previously thought
item.description: Oceans are rising as the climate changes, threatening coastal cities. A new study shows that much more of the world's population is vulnerable than earlier predictions had estimated.
item.content:encoded:
Oceans are rising as the climate changes, threatening coastal cities. A new study shows that much more of the world's population is vulnerable than earlier predictions had estimated.

(Image credit: Josh Edelson)
item.dc:creator: Lauren Sommer

item.title: 12 years on, renewed hunt for missing Malaysia Airlines flight comes up empty
item.description: Twelve years after Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 vanished with 239 people aboard, a deep-sea search has so far failed to locate the missing aircraft, as families pressed for the effort to continue.
item.content:encoded:
Twelve years after Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 vanished with 239 people aboard, a deep-sea search has so far failed to locate the missing aircraft, as families pressed for the effort to continue.

(Image credit: Vincent Thian)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. military kills 6 in strike on alleged drug boat in the Eastern Pacific
item.description: Sunday's attack brought the death toll to at least 157 people since the Trump administration began targeting alleged drug-smuggling vessels, in early September.
item.content:encoded:
Sunday's attack brought the death toll to at least 157 people since the Trump administration began targeting alleged drug-smuggling vessels, in early September.

(Image credit: Konstantin Toropin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Video appears to show U.S. cruise missile striking Iranian school compound
item.description: The seven-second video was released by Iranian state media and directly contradicts statements made by President Trump, who said Iran was responsible for the strike.
item.content:encoded:
The seven-second video was released by Iranian state media and directly contradicts statements made by President Trump, who said Iran was responsible for the strike.

(Image credit: Screenshots by Geoff Brumfiel for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel
